description:
Join us on Saturday, May 9, from 1 - 3 PM at Whispering Vine Fourth St. for a tasting featuring 30+ Pinot Noir alongside passed flatbread from the Fourth St. kitchen.

Tasting Fee: $55 per person

Reserve your spot on Tock

Featured Wines:

  • Kosta Browne Barrel Auction Pinot Noir 2021 – Winery $165 – Founded in 1997 by Dan Kosta and Michael Browne, Kosta Browne has become a reference point for premium California Pinot Noir.
  • Rochioli Estate Pinot Noir 2021 – $99.99 – Rochioli is one of the benchmark names in Russian River Valley Pinot Noir, farming estate vineyards that helped define the region for decades.
  • Paul Hobbs Russian River Pinot Noir 2023 – Winery $80 – Paul Hobbs is a world-renowned winemaker twice named Wine Personality of the Year by Robert Parker's Wine Advocate, with a long track record for polished Russian River Pinot Noir.
  • Martinelli "Bondi Home Ranch" Russian River Valley Pinot Noir 2022 – Winery $85 – Martinelli is a fifth-generation Sonoma County family estate with more than 135 years of farming history, producing site-specific wines from prized Russian River vineyards.
  • Louis Jadot Beaune Clos des Couchereaux Premier Cru 2023 – Winery $80 – Maison Louis Jadot, founded in 1859, is one of Burgundy's most respected houses, known for wines that emphasize site, structure and classic Côte d'Or character.

Come explore 30+ Pinot Noir Wines and find your favorite bottle. Discover your favorite pour from the lineup.
title: Passion for Pinot Party
